name: Hoylu AB (publ)
summary: Hoylu AB (publ) provides software that focus on enhancing the user experience for enterprises. It offers Hoylu Connected Workspaces, a software that delivers a set of personalized digital workspaces to enable teams to work from anywhere with any device for engineering, pharmaceutical, construction, manufacturing, travel, hospitality, graphic design, and other industries; and allows users to create and share workspaces for free form sketching, drawing, mark-ups, and organization of documents, pictures, video-links, and other types of content on an infinite canvas. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Norrk√É¬∂ping, Sweden.
